articles.title: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite is now ready for scaled production use

articles.title: Advanced version of Gemini with Deep Think officially achieves gold-medal standard at the International Mathematical Olympiad
articles.summary: The International Mathematical Olympiad (“IMO”) is the world’s most prestigious competition for young mathematicians, and has been held annually since 1959. Each country taking part is represented by six elite, pre-university mathematicians who compete to solve six exceptionally difficult problems in algebra, combinatorics, geometry, and number theory.

articles.title: Aeneas transforms how historians connect the past
articles.summary: Introducing the first model for contextualizing ancient inscriptions, designed to help historians better interpret, attribute and restore fragmentary texts.

articles.title: Genie 3: A new frontier for world models

articles.title: Rethinking how we measure AI intelligence
articles.summary: Game Arena is a new, open-source platform for rigorous evaluation of AI models. It allows for head-to-head comparison of frontier systems in environments with clear winning conditions.

articles.title: Introducing Gemma 3 270M: The compact model for hyper-efficient AI
articles.summary: Today, we're adding a new, highly specialized tool to the Gemma 3 toolkit: Gemma 3 270M, a compact, 270-million parameter model.
